q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.write_bytes(request.body) on line 143, an irreversible filesystem write that could overwrite arbitrary files via path traversal.

mock_guidance.target: Mock the pathlib.Path.write_bytes method called on the target object at line 143.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the resolved target path (to verify directory traversal) and the bytes argument (request.body) passed to write_bytes.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Record the arguments and return a no-op, preventing any actual filesystem write.
notes: Although the function returns a JsonResponse containing str(target) and len(request.body), the primary concern is preventing the side-effectful write.
Ensure the mock does not interfere with the return value construction so a return_value strategy could also be layered if desired.
